# opnsense_quagga_ospf6_interface (Resource)

Manages an OSPFv3 interface on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `area` (String) OSPFv3 area.
- `interface` (String) Interface name.

### Optional

- `bfd` (Boolean) Enable BFD on this interface.
- `cost` (Number) Interface cost (0 = auto).
- `dead_interval` (Number) Dead interval in seconds (0 = default).
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this interface config is enabled.
- `hello_interval` (Number) Hello interval in seconds (0 = default).
- `network_type` (String) OSPFv3 network type.
- `passive` (Boolean) Mark interface passive.
- `priority` (Number) Router priority (0 = default).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
